claims.claim: WordPress.com technical documentation was provided as source material instead of Greek content
claims.reasoning: All three agents independently reported this and it can be verified by examining sources 1-7 which are WordPress.com pages

claims.claim: Portuguese banking information about Banco BPI was included in sources
claims.source_title: Banco BPI: garante a melhor proposta de crédito - ComparaJá.pt
claims.reasoning: Two agents independently reported this and it is verified by source 8 which contains Portuguese banking content

claims.claim: Retail store listings from North Dakota (Menards) were provided as sources
claims.reasoning: All three agents independently reported this and it can be verified by sources 9-13 which contain Menards store information from North Dakota, US

claims.claim: Baseball statistics for Venezuelan player Wilyer Abreu were included in sources
claims.reasoning: Two agents independently reported this and it is verified by source 14 which contains MLB statistics for Wilyer Abreu, framed through US baseball context

claims.claim: No substantive information about Greece was available in the provided sources
claims.reasoning: All three agents independently reached this conclusion, and examination of all sources confirms none contain Greek domestic content

claims.claim: Sources labeled as Greek language content were misclassified
claims.reasoning: Two agents independently reported this discrepancy between source labels and actual content

claims.claim: No information about Greek domestic politics was available

claims.claim: No information about Greek economy was available
